headline: IBKR Unveils Unified Crypto Trading Platform for European Investors
summary: Interactive Brokers expands into crypto in Europe, enabling trading of 11 digital assets alongside traditional investments on a unified platform.

headline: Is It Time To Reassess Charles Schwab (SCHW) After Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Run
summary: This article examines whether Charles Schwab’s current share price still offers value or if most of the opportunity is already reflected, by walking through what the numbers indicate. The stock last closed at US$93.98, with returns of a 1.8% decline over 7 days, a 1.3% decline over 30 days, a 7.5% decline year to date, a 22.5% gain over 1 year, a 96.4% gain over 3 years, and a 49.1% gain over 5 years. Recent news coverage has focused on Charles Schwab’s role as a major US brokerage and...

headline: How Investors May Respond To Charles Schwab (SCHW) Teen Accounts With Education-Tied Fractional Share Rewards
summary: In March 2026, The Charles Schwab Corporation launched the Schwab Teen Investor account, a joint brokerage account for 13- to 17-year-olds and their parents that offers no minimums, $0 commissions on online listed equity trades, extensive educational content, and restricted access to higher-risk products. By tying a US$50 fractional-share reward to completion of an online investing course, Schwab is using financial incentives to promote early financial literacy and long-term engagement with...
